name: Artis' Chicken Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tbsp oil or chicken fat for roux
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut up the chicken and season with salt and pepper.
2. Fry the chicken until brown in its own fat, using a black iron pot.
3. Place the cooked chicken in the soup pot.
4. Cut up the remaining seasonings (garlic, green pepper).
5. Pour off the fat from the pot.
6. Smother the seasonings with flour and mix well.
7. Remove the seasonings by rinsing them with a small amount of water and add to the soup pot with the oysters.
8. Cook until the flavors are well combined and serve hot.
